name: I missed weeks of work from breathing issues, what wage loss pay?
description: 66% wages tax-free after waiting period; doctor notes required.

mainEntity.name: I missed weeks of work from breathing issues, what wage loss pay?

acceptedAnswer.text: 66% wages tax-free after waiting period; doctor notes required.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Temporary total disability: 66-75% wages from day 4, up to 1 year.** Permanent if residual impairment[4]. Key factors: Pay stubs prove average; light duty offsets; Utah min/max weekly. Retroactive if approved. Submit doctor restrictions. Appeal reductions.
